subject: fix(pwa): gate needRefresh fallback with wasJustUpdated() suppression
body:
useRegisterSW sets needRefresh internally regardless of what the
onNeedRefresh callback does. Without gating the || needRefresh fallback,
the 30-second suppression could be bypassed by the library's own state.

Tags: pwa, hooks
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: pwa-reliability
Semver: patch
